# Talva

> Talva is the enterprise AI agent platform: a unified data and API layer you connect your existing data sources to, so every AI agent your company ships works against one consistent, permissioned backend.

Talva is not a database, a vector store, or an agent framework. It sits above your existing data sources — like Hasura DDN does for apps — and gives every AI agent in your company one API, one auth model, one audit trail. Bring your own AI (Claude, OpenAI, or anything else); agents are first-class users.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview and beta signup.
- [Data Layer](/platform/data-layer): Unified data layer for AI agents.
- [WASM Functions](/platform/wasm-functions): Sandboxed functions agents call as tools.
- [Secrets](/platform/secrets): Per-agent secrets management.
- [Agent-Native](/platform/agent-native): Model-agnostic agent backend.
